Details:
Removed attributes from `Membership` related to separate resources.

Moved enrollment attributes from `Group` into `Enrollment` resource.

Resources.Name: Attendance
Resources.Description: Individual event attendance for a person.

Attributes.Name: attended
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the person attended the event.

Attributes.Name: role
Attributes.Description:
The role of the person at the time of event.


Possible values: `member`, `leader`, `visitor`, or `applicant`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-first_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-last_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-role) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: role
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific role

Possible values: `member`, `leader`, `visitor`, or `applicant`

Resources.Name: Campus
Resources.Description: A campus as defined in Planning Center Accounts

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the campus

Children.Name: groups
Children.Description: groups which have applied this campus

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Enrollment
Resources.Description: Details on how and when members can join a `Group`.

Attributes.Name: auto_closed
Attributes.Description: Whether or not enrollment has been closed automatically due to set limits

Attributes.Name: auto_closed_reason
Attributes.Description: Brief description as to which limit automatically closed enrollment

Attributes.Name: date_limit
Attributes.Description: Date when enrollment should automatically close

Attributes.Name: date_limit_reached
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the `date_limit` has been reached

Attributes.Name: member_limit
Attributes.Description: Total number of members allowed before enrollment should automatically close

Attributes.Name: member_limit_reached
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the `member_limit` has been reached

Attributes.Name: status
Attributes.Description:
Current enrollment status. Possible values:
* `open` - strategy is not `closed` and no limits have been reached
* `closed` - strategy is `closed` _or_ limits have been reached
* `full` - member limit has been reached
* `private` - group is unlisted

Attributes.Name: strategy
Attributes.Description: Sign up strategy. Possible values: `request_to_join`, `open_signup`, or `closed`

Resources.Name: Event
Resources.Description:
An event is a meeting of a group. It has a start and end time, and can be
either physical or virtual.

Attributes.Name: attendance_requests_enabled
Attributes.Description:
This is a group setting that applies to all the events in the group.
If selected, an email will be sent to the primary email address of the group leader
60 minutes before the event start time, asking them to report attendance.

Attributes.Name: automated_reminder_enabled
Attributes.Description:
If `true`, we send an event remind some specified time before the event starts
to all members in the group.

Attributes.Name: canceled
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the event has been canceled.

Attributes.Name: canceled_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the event was canceled.

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A longform description of the event. Can contain HTML markup.

Attributes.Name: ends_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the event ends.

Attributes.Name: image
Attributes.Description: The image for the event.

Attributes.Name: location_type_preference
Attributes.Description: Either "physical" or "virtual".

Attributes.Name: multi_day
Attributes.Description: `true` if the event spans multiple days. Otherwise `false`.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name/title of the event.

Attributes.Name: reminders_sent
Attributes.Description: `true` if reminders have been sent for this event. Otherwise `false`.

Attributes.Name: reminders_sent_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time reminders were sent for this event.

Attributes.Name: repeating
Attributes.Description: `true` if the event is a repeating event. Otherwise `false`.

Attributes.Name: starts_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the event starts.

Attributes.Name: virtual_location_url
Attributes.Description:
The URL for the virtual location. Typically we don't show this URL unless
unless the location_type_preference is "virtual".

Attributes.Name: visitors_count
Attributes.Description:
The number of visitors who attended the event. These are people who are not
members of the group.

Filters.Name: attended
Filters.Description: where `attended` is `true`

Children.Name: group
Children.Description: group which the event belongs to

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-ends_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-starts_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: EventNote
Resources.Description: Notes that group leaders can write for an event, generally related to attendance.

Attributes.Name: body
Attributes.Description: The body text of the note.

Resources.Name: Group
Resources.Description: A group of people that meet together regularly.

Attributes.Name: archived_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the group was archived.

Attributes.Name: can_create_conversation
Attributes.Description:
A boolean representing the current user's authorization to start a new conversation in the group.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: chat_enabled
Attributes.Description: A boolean representing whether or not the group has Chat enabled.

Attributes.Name: contact_email
Attributes.Description:
If a contact_email is provided, we will display a contact button on the public page
where potential members can ask questions before joining the group.

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the group was created.

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A longform description of the group. Can contain HTML markup.

Attributes.Name: description_as_plain_text
Attributes.Description: The plain text version of the group description.

Attributes.Name: events_listed
Attributes.Description: Whether or not events are visible to the public on Church Center

Attributes.Name: events_visibility
Attributes.Description:
The visibility of events for the group.


Possible values: `public` or `members`

Attributes.Name: header_image
Attributes.Description:
A hash of header image URLs. The keys are `thumbnail`, `medium`, and `original`.

```json
{
  "thumbnail": "https://groups-production.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/group/header_image/1986065/thumbnail_image-1676676396838.jpg",
  "medium": "https://groups-production.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/group/header_image/1986065/medium_image-1676676396838.jpg",
  "original": "https://groups-production.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/group/header_image/1986065/image-1676676396838.jpg"
}
```

Attributes.Name: leaders_can_search_people_database
Attributes.Description:
Whether or not group leaders have access to the entire
church database on the admin side of Groups. (Not recommended)

Attributes.Name: listed
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the group is visible on Church Center

Attributes.Name: location_type_preference
Attributes.Description:
The location type preference for the group.


Possible values: `physical` or `virtual`

Attributes.Name: members_are_confidential
Attributes.Description: Whether or not group members can see other members' info

Attributes.Name: memberships_count
Attributes.Description:
The number of members in the group, includes leaders.
Does not include membership requests.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name/title of the group.

Attributes.Name: public_church_center_web_url
Attributes.Description: The public URL for the group on Church Center.

Attributes.Name: schedule
Attributes.Description:
A text summary of the group's typical meeting schedule.
Can be a string like "Sundays at 9:30am" or "Every other Tuesday at 7pm".

Attributes.Name: tag_ids
Attributes.Description:
The IDs of the tags associated with the group.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: virtual_location_url
Attributes.Description:
The URL for the group's virtual location. A zoom link, for example.
This could be set even if `location_type_preference` is `physical`.
This is useful if you want to display a zoom link even if the group is meeting in person.

Attributes.Name: widget_status
Attributes.Description:
DEPRECATED: This is a private attribute used by Home widgets that we plan to remove soon.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Relationships.Name: group_type
Relationships.Note:
The group type that this group belongs to.
Unique groups do not belong to a group type
and will return a `null` data set for the relationship.

Relationships.Name: location
Relationships.Note:
The group's default location is where the group normally meets.
But remember, each group event can have its own location if needed.

Filters.Name: canceled
Filters.Description: have a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: not_canceled
Filters.Description: do not have a `canceled_at` date and time

Children.Name: location
Children.Description: default physical location for this group's events

Children.Name: my_membership
Children.Description: the current person's membership for this group

Children.Name: people
Children.Description: people who have memberships for this group

Children.Name: resources
Children.Description: file and link resources shared with this group

Filters.Name: leaders
Filters.Description: only visible to group leaders

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-chat_enabled) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-contact_email) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-enrollment_limit) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-listed) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-members_are_confidential) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-memberships_count) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: archive_status
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific archive_status

Possible values: `not_archived`, `only`, or `include`

Resources.Name: GroupApplication
Resources.Description: A group application is a request to join a group which can be approved or rejected.

Attributes.Name: applied_at
Attributes.Description: Timestamp when this person applied.

Attributes.Name: message
Attributes.Description: An optional personal message from the applicant.

Attributes.Name: status
Attributes.Description:
The approval status of the application.

Possible values: `pending`, `approved`, or `rejected`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-applied_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-status) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: GroupType
Resources.Description:
A group type is a category of groups.
For example, a church might have group types for "Small Groups" and "Classes".

Attributes.Name: church_center_map_visible
Attributes.Description: `true` if the map view is visible on the public groups list page. Otherwise `false`.

Attributes.Name: church_center_visible
Attributes.Description: `true` if the group type contains any published groups. Otherwise `false`.

Attributes.Name: color
Attributes.Description:
Hex color value. Color themes are a visual tool for administrators on the admin side of Groups.
Ex: "#4fd2e3"

Attributes.Name: default_group_settings
Attributes.Description: A JSON object of default settings for groups of this type.

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A description of the group type

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the group type

Attributes.Name: position
Attributes.Description: The position of the group type in relation to other group types.

Attributes.Name: public_church_center_web_url
Attributes.Description: The public URL for the group on Church Center.

Children.Name: events
Children.Description: events of groups with this group type

Filters.Name: canceled
Filters.Description: has a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: not_canceled
Filters.Description: do not have a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: upcoming
Filters.Description: future `starts_at` date and time

Children.Name: groups
Children.Description: groups belonging to this group type

Children.Name: resources
Children.Description: file or link resources shared with all groups in this group type

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-position) to reverse the order

Attributes.Name: display_preference
Attributes.Description:
This preference controls how the location is displayed to non-members for public groups and events.


Possible values: `hidden`, `approximate`, or `exact`

Attributes.Name: full_formatted_address
Attributes.Description:
Ex: "1313 Disneyland Dr
Anaheim, CA 92802" (may be approximate or `null`)
Approximate address would be "Anaheim, CA 92802".
We obscure Canadian zip codes.

Attributes.Name: latitude
Attributes.Description: Ex: `33.815396` (may be approximate or `null`)

Attributes.Name: longitude
Attributes.Description: Ex: `-117.926399` (may be approximate or `null`)

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Ex: "Disneyland"

Attributes.Name: radius
Attributes.Description:
The number of miles in a location's approximate address.
Will be `0` if the strategy is exact, and will be `null` if the strategy is hidden.

Attributes.Name: strategy
Attributes.Description:
The display preference strategy used for the current request, based on user permissions.
Either `hidden`, `approximate`, or `exact`.

Resources.Name: Membership
Resources.Description:
The state of a `Person` belonging to a `Group`.

A `Person` can only have one active `Membership` to a `Group` at a time.

Attributes.Name: joined_at
Attributes.Description: The date and time the person joined the group.

Attributes.Name: role
Attributes.Description:
The role of the person in the group.
Possible values: `member` or `leader`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-first_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-joined_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-last_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-role) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Organization
Resources.Description: The organization represents a single church. Every other resource is scoped to this record.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the organization.

Attributes.Name: time_zone
Attributes.Description: The time zone of the organization.

Children.Name: events
Children.Description: events for all groups in this organization

Filters.Name: canceled
Filters.Description: has a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: group
Filters.Description:
from specific groups; provide an additional `group_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=group&group_id=1,2,3`

Filters.Name: group_type
Filters.Description:
from specific group types; provide an additional `group_type_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=group_type&group_type_id=1,2,3`

Filters.Name: my_groups
Filters.Description: only group events of which you are a member

Filters.Name: not_canceled
Filters.Description: does not have a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: upcoming
Filters.Description: future `starts_at` date and time

Children.Name: group_applications
Children.Description: requests to join groups for this organization

Filters.Name: church_center_visible
Filters.Description: contains groups which are published to Church Center

Filters.Name: not_church_center_visible
Filters.Description: does not contain any groups published to Church Center

Filters.Name: campus
Filters.Description:
from specific campuses; provide an additional `campus_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=campus&campus_id=1,2,3`

Filters.Name: enrollment
Filters.Description:
filter groups with enrollment settings; provide an additional `enrollment` param
as a comma-separated list of values, ex: `?filter=enrollment&enrollment=open_signup,request_to_join,closed`

Filters.Name: group
Filters.Description:
from specific groups; provide an additional `group_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=group&group_id=1,2,3`

Filters.Name: group_type
Filters.Description:
from specific group types; provide an additional `group_type_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=group_type&group_type_id=1,2,3`

Filters.Name: hidden
Filters.Description: filter groups that are not published on Church Center

Filters.Name: meeting_schedule
Filters.Description: filter groups that have a meeting schedule

Filters.Name: my_groups
Filters.Description: only groups of which you are a member

Filters.Name: people_database_searchable
Filters.Description:
based on their setting of allowing leaders to search the entire
church database in Groups; provide an additional
`people_database_searchable` param with `only` or `none`,
ex: `?filter=people_database_searchable&people_database_searchable=only`

Filters.Name: published
Filters.Description: filter groups that are published on Church Center

Filters.Name: tag
Filters.Description:
filter groups with tags; provide an additional `tag_id` param
as a comma-separated list of IDs, ex: `?filter=tag&tag_id=1,2,3`.
filtering by tags within a tag group will expand results,
and across tag groups will reduce results.

Filters.Name: public
Filters.Description: where `display_publicly` is enabled

Resources.Name: Owner
Resources.Description: The owner/creator of an event note.

Attributes.Name: avatar_url
Attributes.Description: The URL of the person's avatar.

Attributes.Name: first_name
Attributes.Description: The person's first name.

Attributes.Name: last_name
Attributes.Description: The person's last name.

Resources.Name: Person
Resources.Description:
A person is a user of Planning Center.
They can be a member of a group, a leader of a group, or an administrator.

Attributes.Name: addresses
Attributes.Description: Returns all the addresses associated with this person.

Attributes.Name: avatar_url
Attributes.Description: The URL of the person's avatar.

Attributes.Name: child
Attributes.Description:
Whether or not the person is under 13 years old.
This is false if a birthdate is not set.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: Date and time this person was first created in Planning Center

Attributes.Name: email_addresses
Attributes.Description:
Returns all the email addresses associated with this person.

```json
[{
  "address": "sam@example.com",
  "location": "Home",
  "primary": true
}]
```

Attributes.Name: first_name
Attributes.Description: The person's first name.

Attributes.Name: last_name
Attributes.Description: The person's last name.

Attributes.Name: permissions
Attributes.Description: Can be `administrator`, `group_type_manager`, `leader`, `member`, or `no access`.

Attributes.Name: phone_numbers
Attributes.Description:
Returns all the phone numbers associated with this person.

```json
[{
  "number": "(800) 123-4567",
  "carrier": null,
  "location": "Mobile",
  "primary": true
}]
```

Children.Name: events
Children.Description: events of groups which this person is a member

Filters.Name: canceled
Filters.Description: has a `canceled_at` date and time

Filters.Name: not_canceled
Filters.Description: does not have a `canceled_at` date and time

Children.Name: groups
Children.Description: groups of which this person is a member

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-first_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-last_name) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: RSVP
Resources.Description:
A person's RSVP response for a group event.
RSVPs can be submitted at any point leading up to the event.
When an event reminder is sent, `awaiting_response` RSVPs are generated for
any remaining members, or `not_sent` if they're missing an email address.

Attributes.Name: response
Attributes.Description: Possible values: `awaiting_response`, `yes`, `no`, `maybe`, or `not_sent`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-response) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: response
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific response

Possible values: `awaiting_response`, `yes`, `no`, `maybe`, or `not_sent`

Resources.Name: Resource
Resources.Description: A file or link resource that can be shared with a group.

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: The description of the resource written by the person who created it.

Attributes.Name: last_updated
Attributes.Description: The date and time the resource was last updated.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name/title of the resource.

Attributes.Name: type
Attributes.Description: Either `FileResource` or `LinkResource`

Attributes.Name: visibility
Attributes.Description: Possible values: `leaders` or `members`

Relationships.Name: created_by
Relationships.Note: The person who created this resource

Children.Name: download
Children.Description: link to download this file resource

Children.Name: visit
Children.Description: link to visit this link resource

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-last_updated) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Tag
Resources.Description:
Tags are used to filter groups.
They can be organized into tag_groups.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the tag

Attributes.Name: position
Attributes.Description: The position of the tag in relation to other tags

Children.Name: groups
Children.Description: groups which have applied this tag

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-position) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: TagGroup
Resources.Description:
A way to group related tags.
For example you could have a "Life Stage" tag group
with tags like "Child", "Teen", "Adult", etc.

Attributes.Name: display_publicly
Attributes.Description: Whether or not this tag group is visible to the public on Church Center

Attributes.Name: multiple_options_enabled
Attributes.Description: Whether or not a group can belong to many tags within this tag group

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the tag group

Attributes.Name: position
Attributes.Description: The position of the tag group in relation to other tag groups

Children.Name: tags
Children.Description: tags belonging to this tag group

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-position) to reverse the order
